body: Simple fix to use the cell-centered vertical spacing (face-to-face distance) in the continuity equation for determining w in the hydrostatic model.  The code currently uses the face-centered spacing (center-to-center distance), which is the same for the uniform grid but not for the vertically stretched grid.  With help from @sandreza and @jm-c.

labels.description: Even a perfect program still has bugs
labels.name: bug 🐞

labels.description: So things don't blow up and boil the lobsters alive
labels.name: numerics 🧮

title: Fix bug in hydrostatic vertical velocity with stretched grid
